basic_details.job_title: DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Case worker, MPW and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Case worker, MPW and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The District Social Welfare Office, Majuli (DSWO Majuli) has officially announced the Case Worker, MPW and More Posts Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification has been released under Advertisement No. DSWO(M)/OSC/2025-2026/01. Candidates possessing qualifications such as 10th Pass, HSLC Pass, High School Pass, or a Bachelor's Degree in the relevant discipline are eligible to apply offline. Interested applicants can submit their applications up to 17 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th-pass, HSLC passed, High school passed, Bachelor's degree
qualification.details: Case worker: Bachelor's degree in law/social work/sociology/social science/Psychology with minimum 3 years of experience of working on women related relevant domains in a government or non-government projects/programme. Counsellor: Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in the health sector/Social Work/Sociology/ with minimum 3 years of experience of working with a government or non-government health project/programme at the District level. Office Assistant: Bachelor's degree with a diploma in Computer/IT etc. with 3 years' experience in office documentation and web-based reporting formats, video conferencing at state or district level with government or non-governmental/IT based organization. Multi-purpose worker: High school passed or equivalent will be preferred, with any women who is literate with knowledge/experience of working in the relevant domain. Security Guard: HSLC passed, with minimum 2 years of experience of working as a security personnel in a government or reputed organization at the District/State level.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DSWO Majuli Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://majuli.assam.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026 is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various posts, including Case worker, Counsellor, Office Assistant, Multi-purpose worker, and Security Guard.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Security Guard post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Security Guard post is HSLC passed.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Case worker post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Case worker post is Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Interview (viva-voice).

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates applying for these posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The job type for all the recruited candidates will be on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. What is the educational qualification for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Office Assistant post is a Bachelor's degree with a diploma in Computer/IT etc.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to the office of the District Social Welfare Officer, Majuli, Civil Tiniali, Garamur, Pin-785104, Assam.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DSWO Majuli Recruitment 2026 is 17th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.
